pi_items.source: Confirmed by install_gvsig.sh which downloads and unzips the Natural Earth data into this directory structure.
Confirmed by task.json instructions, setup_task.sh which cleans it, and verifier.py which checks it.
Confirmed by task.json instructions and verifier.py which explicitly requires these fields in the output.
Downloaded ne_110m_populated_places.zip from naciscdn.org and verified the shapefile contains exactly 243 records.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires modifying a real Natural Earth dataset (ne_110m_populated_places.shp) located at /home/ga/gvsig_data/cities/, containing exactly 243 point features. The required output is a new shapefile saved to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/cities_with_coords.shp containing two new numeric fields (X_COORD and Y_COORD), storing the accurate longitude and latitude coordinates of each point.
